@graph.name: Paul Mackenzie
@graph.description: Product designer with sixteen years of experience. Founding designer across five acquired companies. Designs and builds his own products.

hasOccupation.name: Product Designer
hasOccupation.skills: Product design, UX/UI design, branding, creative direction, front-end development, design advisory

alumniOf.name: PartnerHero
alumniOf.description: Head of UI & UX. Acquired by Crescendo.

@graph.name: Paul Mackenzie
@graph.description: Product designer. Five exits. Available to hire.

@graph.name: workingon.studio projects
@graph.description: Solo-built products: concept, design, development, live.

itemListElement.name: Hidden Current
itemListElement.description: Shows the environmental cost of AI chat responses inline, with running totals. Runs entirely in the browser with no account required.

itemListElement.name: Tiny Wave
itemListElement.description: Draws SVG audio waveforms using your microphone via the browser, for download or copy-paste. Works fully offline.

itemListElement.name: Madebyhumans
itemListElement.description: A generative art piece marking presence rather than metrics, using flow fields driven by basic browser data, fossilised daily as an image or SVG.

itemListElement.name: When to Work
itemListElement.description: Finds overlapping working hours across timezones by plotting time horizontally, without sharing private schedule data.

itemListElement.name: Good Boy
itemListElement.description: A Figma plugin that automatically adds low-effort praise comments to designs, satirising generic design feedback culture.

itemListElement.name: Sketch QR
itemListElement.description: A free Sketch plugin for inserting SVG QR codes with configurable size, padding, and colour.

itemListElement.name: Glyph Palette
itemListElement.description: A searchable icon plugin for Sketch with over 10,000 icons across multiple sets, officially recognised by Sketch.

itemListElement.name: Is Figma Down
itemListElement.description: A satirical status page mimicking Figma's outage page, made during a major cloud outage to question over-reliance on always-online tools.

itemListElement.name: Sketch Today
itemListElement.description: A continually updated resource hub for Sketch users, including a Tailwind colour palette, icons, and plugins.

itemListElement.name: Solidarity
itemListElement.description: A browser extension that shows everyone on LinkedIn as #opentowork, satirising the visibility of job searching.

itemListElement.name: Dad Reply
itemListElement.description: A Gmail extension that adds a one-click reply button sending a thumbs-up emoji, for emails that only need acknowledgement.
